retry_reason: This is a put wrapper: if parent is NULL, the call is a no-op; if non-NULL, the refcount decrement is unconditional and cannot fail. Retrying would either double-put (use-after-free risk) or be pointless.
contract_summary: Release a reference on an audit_parent object via its embedded fsnotify mark. If parent is NULL, the call is safe (no-op). After calling, the caller must not access the parent object, as it may have been freed if the reference count reached zero. This is the standard release operation for audit_parent instances.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the reference count of an audit_parent by calling fsnotify_put_mark. The only additional logic is a NULL check, which is standard for defensive put helpers.

check.reason: The function calls fsnotify_put_mark(&parent->mark) which performs a put on mark.refcnt.refs. The access path starting from parameter 1 (parent) via parent.mark.refcnt.refs matches the callee's member access path and type chain. Segment counts are equal (4 segments, 4 types). The operation is correctly extracted.
